|--------|--------|-------|---------|
| **FE** | Restaurants, cafes, pubs, takeaways | Ordering system (£49.99/mo) + POS | 100% first mo + 20% ongoing + 0.1% GTV |
| **CF** | Beauty, hair, hotels, retail, trades | Website (£200) + social (£75/mo) | Direct client income |

**Unified pipeline:** `/root/trading_bot/outreach.py` (VPS)
- Single script handles both engines with `--engine fe` or `--engine cf` flag
- Routing logic: food business types → FE, everything else → CF
- LBD search categories differ by engine (restaurants for FE, beauty/hair/hotel for CF)
- CSV register pass available for CF (`--csv sevenoaks`) — non-food businesses only

# CF leads (non-food)

# CF from register (skips food automatically)
python3 outreach.py --csv sevenoaks --limit 10 --engine cf --send

- ~/SESSION_STATE.md — current bot status, build queue, what was built (always read first)
